title: Unlock AI Agent Control: Gemma 4, Local Power & Your Questions Answer #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses local control capabilities with Gemma 4 and solicits questions from the AI builder community for future content. The video emphasizes enabling local deployment and user control of AI models.
